'''√ng-ng-v''' ('''ngangava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobectomize|lobectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobectomize|lobectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-ng-v
|-
! Lemma
| ngangava
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangavithi|ngangavithi]] || [[word:ngangaviji|ngangaviji]] || [[word:ngangavishi|ngangavishi]] || [[word:ngangavi|ngangavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangavuthuth|ngangavuthuth]] || [[word:ngangavujuj|ngangavujuj]] || [[word:ngangavushush|ngangavushush]] || [[word:ngangav|ngangav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangavuthu|ngangavuthu]] || [[word:ngangavuju|ngangavuju]] || [[word:ngangavushu|ngangavushu]] || [[word:ngangavu|ngangavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangavufuth|ngangavufuth]] || [[word:ngangavufuj|ngangavufuj]] || [[word:ngangavufush|ngangavufush]] || [[word:ngangavuf|ngangavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangavethe|ngangavethe]] || [[word:ngangaveje|ngangaveje]] || [[word:ngangaveshe|ngangaveshe]] || [[word:ngangave|ngangave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangavothoth|ngangavothoth]] || [[word:ngangavojoj|ngangavojoj]] || [[word:ngangavoshosh|ngangavoshosh]] || [[word:ngangav|ngangav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangavotho|ngangavotho]] || [[word:ngangavojo|ngangavojo]] || [[word:ngangavosho|ngangavosho]] || [[word:ngangavo|ngangavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangavofoth|ngangavofoth]] || [[word:ngangavofoj|ngangavofoj]] || [[word:ngangavofosh|ngangavofosh]] || [[word:ngangavof|ngangavof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangavïfïf|ngangavïfïf]] || [[word:ngangavïfïf|ngangavïfïf]] || [[word:ngangavïfïf|ngangavïfïf]] || [[word:ngangavïfïf|ngangavïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]] || [[word:ngangavïf|ngangavïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangavæthæ|ngangavæthæ]] || [[word:ngangavæjæ|ngangavæjæ]] || [[word:ngangavæshæ|ngangavæshæ]] || [[word:ngangavæ|ngangavæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangavathath|ngangavathath]] || [[word:ngangavajaj|ngangavajaj]] || [[word:ngangavashash|ngangavashash]] || [[word:ngangav|ngangav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangavatha|ngangavatha]] || [[word:ngangavaja|ngangavaja]] || [[word:ngangavasha|ngangavasha]] || [[word:ngangava|ngangava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangavafath|ngangavafath]] || [[word:ngangavafaj|ngangavafaj]] || [[word:ngangavafash|ngangavafash]] || [[word:ngangavaf|ngangavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngangavasha|ngangavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongangavasha|gongangavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingangavasha|gokingangavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngangavnüasha|ngangavnüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongangavnknüasha|gongangavnknüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingangavnüasha|gokingangavnüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngangavshëasha|ngangavshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongangavnkshëasha|gongangavnkshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingangavshëasha|gokingangavshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangavroasha|ngangavroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangavnkroasha|gongangavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangavroasha|gokingangavroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangavmuasha|ngangavmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangavnkmuasha|gongangavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangavmuasha|gokingangavmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngangavsherasha|ngangavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongangavnksherasha|gongangavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingangavsherasha|gokingangavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngangavngasha|ngangavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongangavnkngasha|gongangavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingangavngasha|gokingangavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngangavyaasha|ngangavyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongangavnkyaasha|gongangavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingangavyaasha|gokingangavyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngangavyamasha|ngangavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongangavnkyamasha|gongangavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingangavyamasha|gokingangavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangavnüshëasha|ngangavnüshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangavnknüshëasha|gongangavnknüshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangavnüshëasha|gokingangavnüshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangavnüroasha|ngangavnüroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangavnknüroasha|gongangavnknüroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangavnüroasha|gokingangavnüroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangavnümuasha|ngangavnümuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangavnknümuasha|gongangavnknümuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangavnümuasha|gokingangavnümuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangavshënüasha|ngangavshënüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangavnkshënüasha|gongangavnkshënüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangavshënüasha|gokingangavshënüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangavshëroasha|ngangavshëroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangavnkshëroasha|gongangavnkshëroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangavshëroasha|gokingangavshëroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangavshëmuasha|ngangavshëmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangavnkshëmuasha|gongangavnkshëmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangavshëmuasha|gokingangavshëmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangavronüasha|ngangavronüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangavnkronüasha|gongangavnkronüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangavronüasha|gokingangavronüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangavroshëasha|ngangavroshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangavnkroshëasha|gongangavnkroshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangavroshëasha|gokingangavroshëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangavromuasha|ngangavromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangavnkromuasha|gongangavnkromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangavromuasha|gokingangavromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangavmunüasha|ngangavmunüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangavnkmunüasha|gongangavnkmunüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangavmunüasha|gokingangavmunüasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangavmushëasha|ngangavmushëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangavnkmushëasha|gongangavnkmushëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangavmushëasha|gokingangavmushëasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangavmuroasha|ngangavmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangavnkmuroasha|gongangavnkmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangavmuroasha|gokingangavmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngangav|ngangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ngængæv|ngængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongangav|hongangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hongængæv|hongængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongangav|hohongangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongængæv|hohongængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüngangav|nüngangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüngængæv|nüngængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nününgangav|nününgangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nününgængæv|nününgængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïngangav|nïngangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïngængæv|nïngængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïngangav|nïnïngangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïngængæv|nïnïngængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungangav|lungangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lungængæv|lungængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungangav|lulungangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungængæv|lulungængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingangav|lingangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lingængæv|lingængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingangav|lilingangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingængæv|lilingængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongangav|kongangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kongængæv|kongængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongangav|kokongangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongængæv|kokongængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengangav|kengangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kengængæv|kengængæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengangav|kekengangav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengængæv|kekengængæv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
